query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(data_importacao) as data_minima, MAX(data_importacao) as data_maxima, COUNT(DISTINCT estabelecimentoId) as estabelecimentos, COUNT(DISTINCT convenioId) as convenios FROM recebimento_tiss;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(data_importacao) as data_minima, MAX(data_importacao) as data_maxima, COUNT(DISTINCT estabelecimentoId) as estabelecimentos, COUNT(DISTINCT convenioId) as convenios FROM recebimento_tiss;
